import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import AutoModel

class SpoofModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, encoder_name='facebook/wav2vec2-xls-r-300m'):
        super().__init__()
        self.encoder = AutoModel.from_pretrained(encoder_name)
        hidden = self.encoder.config.hidden_size
        n_layers = self.encoder.config.num_hidden_layers + 1
        self.layer_weights = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(n_layers))
        self.head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(hidden, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.1),
            nn.Linear(256, 1),
        )

    def forward(self, input_values, attention_mask=None):
        out = self.encoder(input_values, attention_mask=attention_mask, output_hidden_states=True)
        hs = torch.stack(out.hidden_states, dim=0)  # L, B, T, H
        w = torch.softmax(self.layer_weights, dim=0).view(-1, 1, 1, 1)
        x = (hs * w).sum(dim=0)  # B, T, H
        if attention_mask is not None:
            # downsample mask to feature time
            feat_len = x.size(1)
            in_len = attention_mask.size(1)
            ratio = in_len / feat_len
            idx = (torch.arange(feat_len, device=x.device).float() * ratio).long().clamp(max=in_len - 1)
            mask = attention_mask[:, idx].float()
            x = (x * mask.unsqueeze(-1)).sum(1) / mask.sum(1, keepdim=True).clamp(min=1)
        else:
            x = x.mean(1)
        return self.head(x).squeeze(-1)
